accounting_export.summary: Generates outbound accounting payloads without allowing inbound ledger mutation in the MVP.
accounting_export.inbound_data_policy: No inbound writes to core transactions in MVP.

payments.summary: Provides payment intent and settlement status boundaries while keeping vendor orchestration outside the MVP core.
payments.inbound_data_policy: Status sync only; no direct mutation of unrelated records.
payments.outbound_data_policy: Connector receives payment requests from approved workflows only.

communications.summary: Wraps outbound and inbound customer communication adapters behind a governed message contract.
communications.inbound_data_policy: Inbound payloads must be normalized before entering core models.
communications.outbound_data_policy: Only message-safe payloads leave the core.

calendar.summary: Defines scheduling synchronization boundaries for external calendar providers.
calendar.inbound_data_policy: Calendar deltas must be scoped to the owning tenant.
calendar.outbound_data_policy: Connector emits scheduling changes only for permitted tenant_scope.
